text_preview:
MARCH 18th, 1991. 

“Correspondence on the possible occurrence of an unidentified flying object on February 4, 1982, in Mogi das Cruzes, state of São Paulo.”

Dear Mr . Brigadier […] 

[…] On 2/2/82, more precisely at 8:05 pm, I was in a local neighborhood, where I lived, observing the weather conditions when I noticed a strange violet light flying at 10° above the horizon in the East-West direction. At first I thought it was an airplane, yet I kept watching it. Suddenly this light  u-turned and started to come towards me (South-North). It was a 90° curve “made in a fraction of a second. As it
summary: Citizen letter to Brazilian military described a violet light over Mogi das Cruzes that executed an instant 90-degree turn, stopped over a railway, then resumed course silently.
